name: Rolo Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a small bowl, combine flour, cocoa powder, and baking soda. Mix well.
3. In a large bowl, beat the sugars and butter until light and fluffy.
4. Add vanilla extract and eggs; beat well.
5. Add the flour mixture; blend well.
6. Stir in 1/2 cup of pecans.
7. For each cookie, shape about 1 tablespoon of dough around a Rolo, covering completely.
8. In a small bowl, combine the remaining pecans and 1 tablespoon of sugar. Press one side of each ball into this mixture.
9. Place the nut side up on an ungreased baking sheet, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
10. Bake for 7-10 minutes or until set and slightly cracked.
11. Cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
